THE AMENDMENT MUST SPELL OUT THE MANDATORY DUTIES THE COMMISSIONER ALLEGEDLY HAS FAILED TO PERFORM AND MUST ALLEGE FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER INSURANCE CODE SECTION 790.03 AND 10291.5. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Michelle Burr of the Office of the Attorney General, 703-1403, appearing for defendant and moving party

No other appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT THE COMMISSIONER OF THE CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF INSURANCE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND IN TEN DAYS. THE WRIT MUST BE VERIFIED. THE AMENDMENT MUST SPELL OUT THE MANDATORY DUTIES THE COMMISSIONER ALLEGEDLY HAS FAILED TO PERFORM AND MUST ALLEGE FACTS THAT ESTABLISH A CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER INSURANCE CODE SECTION 790.03 AND 10291.5. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: PATRICK HEARD, CSR #11055
